---
title: Cache Components
description: In-process and distributed caching components for go-zero.
sidebar:
  order: 4

---

go-zero offers both in-process and distributed caching to reduce database load and improve response times. Caches integrate automatically with database queries generated by `goctl model`.

## Contents

- [Memory Cache](memory-cache.md) — In-process LRU cache for hot data
- [Redis Cache](redis-cache.md) — Distributed Redis cache with automatic invalidation
